title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Pedro, Reiju, Jinbe, Brûlée, Sanji, Luffy as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Will it happen?! His next evolution- tion?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How stupid. I'll just finish him off now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From "Baron Egg" to "Viscount chick"! And then to "Duke Chicken!" every time it breaks, he is reborn stronger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Tama-Tama No mi! Duke chicken is a true knight! Fear him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he evolves, you'll be nothing more than dust at his feet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I don't feel like waiting around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Alright. It ends here, I guess.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There sure are a lot of you soldiers cluttered around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As a decoy, I couldn't wish for anything more!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You scared the crap out of me, Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was the one surprised, to tell you the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would ever expect being called to from inside a mirror?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But! You still managed to come up with a plan

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like this in barely a few seconds! You're amazing, Pedro()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I guess we're actually inside a mirror now... kind of hard to believe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People can't enter or leave this world without Bruce.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: We can save Sanji this way too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just hope he managed to get that rubbing of the poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Everyone's in trouble! We gotta hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tell us where these people are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What sort of art style is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that long-haired girl just ran by me!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
